I’m a product designer helping companies grow through good design, often across 0→1 journeys.

PHONEPE

Led 0→1 design for Pincode, a hyperlocal e-commerce app. Scaled to 20,000+ orders, improving conversion by 37% through frictionless checkout experiences.
